texto: To conquer oneself is the best and noblest victory
autor: to be vanquished by one's own nature is the worst and most ignoble defeat.
explicacao: Citação de to be vanquished by one's own nature is the worst and most ignoble defeat. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To conquer oneself is the best and noblest victory” articula reflexao, plato, conquer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
